title: ArchUnitTS Architecture Testing Library
citation: ArchUnitTS README and package metadata, accessed 2026-05-03.
permitted_uses: Executable architecture-rule enforcement for TypeScript package boundaries, dependency direction checks, circular dependency checks, and naming conventions.
claims_supported: ArchUnitTS is an architecture testing library for TypeScript and JavaScript projects.
ArchUnitTS supports dependency-direction rules, circular dependency detection, naming conventions, custom rules, and Vitest integration.
ArchUnitTS recommends Vitest globals for the toPassAsync matcher, while rule check() can be asserted directly in tests.
As queried on 2026-05-03, archunit 2.3.0 is MIT licensed.
claims_not_supported: That all architectural decisions can be fully enforced through static import analysis alone.
That ArchUnitTS replaces package-level typechecks, runtime integration tests, or security review.
